name: Coconut Curry Chicken

source.cookbook: The Complete and Authentic Thai Curry Cookbook 2
source.author: Various

method: Season the prepared chicken with a dash of salt and black pepper.
In a skillet set over medium to high heat, add in the vegetable oil and
powdered curry. Add in the prepared chopped onions and minced garlic.
Stir well to actually mix and continue to cook for 1 minute.
Add in the seasoned chicken pieces. Toss well to mix.
Lower the heat to an actual medium and cook for 8 to 10 minutes or until
Add in the coconut milk, chopped tomatoes, tomato sauce and white sugar.
Cover and cook for approximately about 35 to 40 minutes.
